title: Discocalyx cybianthoides
taxonomy: Discocalyx cybianthoides is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Discocalyx, which contains a small number of species. The classification of Discocalyx cybianthoides places it within the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Further classification also includes its placement in the order Gentianales and the clade Asterids. As part of its overall classification, Discocalyx cybianthoides is also a member of the clade Angiosperms, which comprises flowering plants.
uses: Discocalyx cybianthoides is a plant species that has been traditionally used in various medicinal applications. The plant has been reported to possess antibacterial and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating infections and wounds. In traditional medicine, the leaves of Discocalyx cybianthoides are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
